title: Max Payne 3
notes: Game starts but gets stuck on "Initializing...", probably because it can't start the Rockstar Social Club DRM background process (subprocess.exe). Works in latest Wine staging versions, but it used to get stuck on Wine too with a subprocess.exe crashdump dialog appearing in the background.

title: Max Payne 3
notes: Game launches but gets stuck "Initializing" forever. Most likely due to Rockstar Social Club.

title: Max Payne 3
notes: ERR_GFX_D3D_NOD3D1X_4 - unrecoverable fault - please restart the game

title: Max Payne 3
notes: Game runs great, only it keeps saying initializing, i think it is soicial club related

title: Max Payne 3
notes: Game starts, but stays on "Initializing" screen, maybe trying to connect with Rockstar Social Club. I've tried to copy RGSC installation from prefix of GTA 5 (which works fine) into MP3's prefix, but no success. On Gnome System Monitor, I can see RGSC's "subprocess.exe" for 5~10 seconds before closing itself. In GTA 5, the "subprocess.exe" stays running while the game is opened.

gpu: X.Org Radeon RX 560 Series (POLARIS11, DRM 3.26.0, 4.18.7-1-MANJARO, LLVM 6.0.1)
notes: Does not start at all
title: Max Payne 3

notes: It launches but gets stuck on the "Initializing..." screen forever.
title: Max Payne 3

notes: Launches fine but gets stuck on 'Initializing'. This most probably has to do with the Rockstar Social Club DRM not launching.
title: Max Payne 3

notes: Boots into a loading screen saying "initializing", doesnt freeze but never initializes
title: Max Payne 3

notes: "Initializing" forever
title: Max Payne 3

notes: Couldn't get past RockStars aggressive DRM (stuck on Initializing) otherwise it looks like it work would fine..
title: Max Payne 3

notes: Launches but gets stuck at title screen trying to initialize Rockstar Social Club. Works fine when launched from Lutris; might need some wine-staging features not yet implemented in Proton.
title: Max Payne 3

notes: Initializing... never ends
title: Max Payne 3

notes: With fullscreen enabled moving the mouse causes weird stuttering. Disabling fullscreen creates a mouse barrier to the left of the screen. Playing with joystick is fine. Performance is good besides the mouse issues.
title: Max Payne 3

notes: Rockstar Social Club initialization bug fixed as of Proton 3.16-5. No issues noted during one hour of play. Mouse controls seem fine.
title: Max Payne 3

notes: With Proton 3.16-5 this game finally works. With earlier versions I could not get into game, it was stuck at loading screen. Now as game works, I can play, completed Chapter I. But there are issues with Mouse. Sometimes it starts locking for short times randomly. Tried few things, could not solve it. Only solution is to play with Controller.
title: Max Payne 3

notes: Since 3.16-5 the game has been running extremely well other than the mouse issue mentioned numerous times below, however, if you don't mind playing with controller this is gold standard, platinum if the mouse is fixed.
title: Max Payne 3

notes: Some people are saying it's working with Proton 3.16-5, but still not working for me (still on "Initializing..." screen and never opens RGSC). I tried to re-install it several times, and, if I run MP3 normally, it won't open. I need to add "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" to launch options to get game opening (and sadly staying on "Initializing..." screen).
title: Max Payne 3

notes: Everything is working flawlessly with Proton 3.16-6.
title: Max Payne 3

notes:
Plays perfectly with small issues:
 - mouse cursor missing when signing in Rockstar Social Club which makes the 
process challenging.
- highlighted objects showing as black stains.
- minor stuttering during the first minutes of the game (probably shaders compilation).
title: Max Payne 3

notes: Now it works. Some graphic settings cause black hair.
title: Max Payne 3

notes: The game launches. Social Club signs in. Single Player campaign works. Multiplayer works and can host a game. During the menus the mouse jerks around the screen and the generally difficult to navigate. During gameplay the performance is poor. The game is playable but the performance issues makes it difficult to be competitive and aiming with accuracy at targets. I have turned the graphics down to low and to Very High and this did not make a difference to the performance. I have tried this with no launch options and "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%", this does not appear to have a noticeable impact on teh performance.
title: Max Payne 3

notes: I found no issues during the first couple of levels, however during the couple of times I started the game I found that I had to press the 'Home' button to access the Rockstar Social Club features, then it would log into the Rockstar social club automatically and the game would load fine. Also when I attempted to change my graphics settings (it did start in 800x600 resolution with everything being low or off) I could not use my mouse, but was able to use keyboard no problem.
